reasoning: Your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance due to an underdeveloped aerobic base and low fatigue resistance. This workout will address these by simulating the demands of the Alpine Loop's main climb. Last ride's average power being 64% of FTP shows potential for more intensity.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform over-unders: alternate 5 min at 209W (88% of FTP) with 3 min at 256W (108% of FTP), repeat 4 times.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
